title: Clippy 3
description: Clippy also catches potential arithmetic issues and suggests safer alternatives.
hints: Use `std::mem::swap(&mut a, &mut b)` or tuple swap instead of manual swap.
Clippy prefers idiomatic patterns that are more readable.
explanation: Clippy encourages using `.is_empty()` over `.len() == 0` because it's more expressive and potentially more efficient. For swapping values, `std::mem::swap()` is the idiomatic approach and avoids the need for a temporary variable. Clippy knows hundreds of such patterns and helps you write better Rust.
